mapper.insert: insert into article_comments (article_id, content, content_html, root_id, parent_id, parent_nickname, visitor_id, nickname, email_or_qq, location, user_agent_os, user_agent_browser, is_approved, is_markdown, is_secret, is_notice, is_edited, is_admin_reply, create_time, update_time) values (#{articleId}, #{content}, #{contentHtml}, #{rootId}, #{parentId}, #{parentNickname}, #{visitorId}, #{nickname}, #{emailOrQq}, #{location}, #{userAgentOs}, #{userAgentBrowser}, #{isApproved}, #{isMarkdown}, #{isSecret}, #{isNotice}, #{isEdited}, #{isAdminReply}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update article_comments set is_approved = 1, update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id, article_id, root_id, parent_id, parent_nickname, content, content_html, is_markdown, visitor_id, nickname, email_or_qq, location, user_agent_os, user_agent_browser, is_approved, is_secret, is_admin_reply, create_time from article_comments where article_id = #{articleId} and (is_approved = 1 or visitor_id = #{visitorId}) order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update article_comments set content = #{content}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, is_edited = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
